Home (current) About us Our Founder Vision, Mission Objectives Management Team Accreditations, Certifications Awards Specialities Medical & Surgical Diagnostics & Therapeutic Patient & Visitor Services Patient, Visitor Guide Book Appointment Hospital Tour Guide Health Checkup Insurance & TPA Empanelled Corporates OPD Schedule Download Forms Suggestions, Complaints Doctors Careers CSR Gallery Contact Our Hospital at Borivli, Mumbai Karuna Charitable Hospital Cathlab Intensive Care Unit Operation Theatre CT Scan Facility Pathology Lab Inhouse Pharmacy Oxygen Plant Ambulance Facility Slide 1 Our Hospital Slide 2 Karuna Hospital Slide 3 Cathlab Slide 4 ICU Slide 5 Operation Theatre Slide 6 CT Scan Slide 7 Pathology Slide 8 Pharmacy Slide 9 Oxygen Plant Slide 10 Ambulance Visit Welcome to Karuna Hospital LOVE-COMPASSION-SERVICE Best of Care, Close to Home.. Karuna Hospital situated in Borivli, a suburb of Mumbai is run by the Mission Sisters of Ajmer, an Indian Congregation of Religious Sisters who have responded to the call of Christ to work for the uplift of women and girl children, and the less fortunate people of our society in urban and rural areas after the charism handed down by our Beloved Founder. Read More Get Your Free Appointment Kindly fill the form with all relevant details and we will get back to you for confirming your appointment asap. Book Appointment Select Appointment 9:00 a.m. - 11:00 a.m. 9:00 p.m. - 12:00 p.m. 10:00 p.m. - 1:00 p.m. 02:00 m.m. - 4:00 p.m. 04:00 m.m. - 8:00 p.m. What we do Our Specialities General Medicine General Medicine includes physicians whose primary role is to provide medical care in the hospital. Orthopaedics Offers comprehensive consultation and treatment services for individuals suffering from musculoskeletal disorders. Paediatrics A robust pediatric department available for care and support from the delivery room(Birth) upto 18 years of age. Cardiology Heart Center combines unrivaled expertise in cardiovascular medicine with top-ranked nursing and diagnostic imaging services Pain Clinics Multidisciplinary team offering services for acute and chronic pain with strong links to the palliative care team. Opthalmology Opthalmology Dept provides a range of speciality clinics for patients with acute or long term eye conditions. Visit Services Patient Guide Patient & Visitor Guide Book-Appointment book your doctor appointment.
